'''thadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loftly|loftly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loftly|loftly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thadhate|thadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thadhatesher|thadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhatesherĂ«m|thadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadhatero|thadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadhateshĂ«|thadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhateshĂ«m|thadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadhatero|gokithadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadhateshĂ«|gokithadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhateshĂ«m|gokithadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothadhankerom|gothadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadhankeshĂ«|gothadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhankeshĂ«m|gothadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothadhankeya|gothadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadhaterom|thadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhatemu|thadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thadhateya|thadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadhaterom|gokithadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhatemu|gokithadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithadhateya|gokithadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thadhadhate|thadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thadhadhatesher|thadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhadhatesherĂ«m|thadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadhadhatero|thadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadhadhateshĂ«|thadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhadhateshĂ«m|thadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadhadhatero|gokithadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadhadhateshĂ«|gokithadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhadhateshĂ«m|gokithadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothadhadhankerom|gothadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadhadhankeshĂ«|gothadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhadhankeshĂ«m|gothadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothadhadhankeya|gothadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thadhadhaterom|thadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhadhatemu|thadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thadhadhateya|thadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithadhadhaterom|gokithadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhadhatemu|gokithadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithadhadhateya|gokithadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠte|thĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠtesher|thĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠtero|thĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokithĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠterom|thĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠtemu|thĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠdhĂŠteya|thĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokithĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokithĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafdhafte|thafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafdhaftesher|thafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafdhaftesherĂ«m|thafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafdhaftero|thafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafdhafteshĂ«|thafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafdhafteshĂ«m|thafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafdhaftero|gokithafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafdhafteshĂ«|gokithafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafdhafteshĂ«m|gokithafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafdhafnkerom|gothafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafdhafnkeshĂ«|gothafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gothafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafdhafnkeya|gothafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafdhafterom|thafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafdhaftemu|thafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafdhafteya|thafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafdhafterom|gokithafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafdhaftemu|gokithafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafdhafteya|gokithafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
